payload.answer: Reject the proposal and escalate to a stronger model for validation. No durable memory updates will be committed.
citations: Brain System Design: Memory Integrity Protocol (Section 4.2.1)

entity_resolution.reason: Schema violation detected in memory proposal. Durable memory integrity at risk.

memory_cards.statement: Cheap model output violated schema constraints (invalid JSON structure, unsafe proposal) in fixture `cascade_validator_failure_escalates_001__context`.
Schema violations in memory proposals must trigger escalation to a stronger model or safe rejection to prevent durable corruption.

details: Proposal rejected due to schema violation (invalid JSON structure).
No memory updates committed to preserve integrity.
